title: Removal or destruction of signs
doc_html:
§111.  Removal or destruction of signs

No person shall willfully or maliciously remove, destroy or deface any sign or notice placed or posted pursuant to R.S. 56:109.  

Amended by Acts 1974, No. 717, §1.
doc_text:
§111.  Removal or destruction of signs
No person shall willfully or maliciously remove, destroy or deface any sign or notice placed or posted pursuant to R.S. 56:109.
Amended by Acts 1974, No. 717, §1.
